name: Process Name Spoofing via System Binary Names
description: Detects processes running from non-standard locations using system binary names
query:
// Detect processes using system binary names from wrong paths
// Trigger on svchost, lsass, csrss, etc. running from non-system dirs
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)(svchost|lsass|csrss|services|smss|winlogon|wininit)\.exe$"
  and exe_path not matches "(?i)(\\windows\\system32\\|\\windows\\syswow64\\)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
